Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay Proceedings In Pending Action Until Arbitration Completed
Off Calendar Dec-29-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Lonnie S. Yu of de la Pena & McDonald, LLP, 227-4100, appearing for defendant and moving party
Jose A. Montalvo of Cesari Werner and Moriarty, 391-1113, appearing for plaintiff and responding party

This matter was not argued. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT THE HARTFORD INSURANCE COMPANY'S Motion To Stay Proceedings In Pending Action Until Arbitration Completed is moot. Prevailing party to prepare form of order. (301/PHA/PM) Judge: Paul H. Alvarado, Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Dec-29-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Lonnie S. Yu of de la Pena & McDonald, LLP, 227-4100, appearing for defendant and moving party
Jose A. Montalvo of Cesari Werner and Moriarty, 391-1113, appearing for plaintiff and responding party

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT THE HARTFORD INSURANCE COMPANY'S Petition To Compel Arbitration is denied. Dispute not covered by agreement. Prevailing party to prepare form of order. (301/PHA/PM) Judge: Paul H. Alvarado, Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
